faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Woodlawn?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Woodlawn typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, accessibility of nesting areas, and extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Woodlawn, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are quite common in Woodlawn due to the neighborhood's tree coverage, proximity to Van Cortlandt Park, and older housing stock with accessible attics and crawl spaces. They're especially active during spring when mothers seek sheltered denning sites to raise their young.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Woodlawn home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Woodlawn residents in most cases.
